reason: Ollama v0.23.3-rc1 is available, offering refined MLX model push behavior for local LLM development.
proposed_post: Ollama v0.23.3-rc1 ships with refined MLX model push behavior. Builders using MLX for local LLM development can test improved model sharing and deployment workflows.
source_angle: Ollama release candidate improves MLX model push

reason: New Ollama RC adds specific hardware detection, directly actionable for local LLM builders.
proposed_post: Ollama v0.30.0-rc15 adds Windows iGPU detection for Vulkan. This could improve local LLM performance and reliability for developers running Ollama on Windows machines with integrated GPUs.
source_angle: Ollama release improves local LLM hardware compatibility
